description: Account in Arabic script. Dating: the date is torn away, but likely Fatimid or Ayyubid. Headed: "that which was collected from...." Then a horizontal line and many names listed underneath. Some of the names: ʿAbd al-Raḥmān... Tāmir from QṬ[...]... Muḥammad Ibn al-Turkmānī... Ibrāhīm al-Qazzāz... al-Ḥājj Ḥasab(?)... al-Ḥājj Aḥmad... ʿĪsā b. [...]... al-khawlī Wuhayb.... Then: "In (New) Cairo, 96 dirhams. Altogether, 43[.] dirhams." Then a new section underneath in a different hand, also listing names and figures. On verso there is Hebrew piyyut.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
